data.title: South African Farms Face El Niño Drought Risk on Top of Iran War
data.description: South African farmers pinched by mounting costs from the Iran war now face the added risk of an El Niño-induced drought, with implications for lower agricultural output and higher food prices.
data.keywords: War,Iran,Farming,Food,South Africa,AGRICULTURAL BUSINESS CHAMBE,Generic 1st 'SB' Future,Generic 1st 'RS' Future,Generic 1st 'O ' Future,inflation,markets,green
